comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Started Actions CodeQL triage from existing rcql report-only scan (8 warnings). Reviewing each finding for true risk and implementing remediations where appropriate.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Actions remediation complete.

Initial report-only findings: 8 warnings.

Changes made:
- Hardened workflow_run gating in .github/workflows/release.yml to only allow successful push events from this repository on main.
- Removed branch-name interpolation from shell commands and validated HEAD_SHA format before checkout in release.yml.
- Added explicit CI token permissions in .github/workflows/ci.yml (contents: read).
- Pinned third-party actions to commit SHAs:
  - dtolnay/rust-toolchain -> 631a55b12751854ce901bb631d5902ceb48146f7 (ci.yml and release.yml)
  - pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish -> ed0c53931b1dc9bd32cbe73a98c7f6766f8a527e (publish-pypi.yml and release.yml)

Validation:
- Fresh scan rcql -q -v --lang=actions --no-fail => Total: 0.
